summary: FASE 4 SO Status 2-level SSOT testing completed. Backend: All tests passed (migration idempotency, stage/sub_status derivation, transition endpoints, guiding 409). Frontend: Stage pills + sub-status chips display correctly in Order List, OrderDetailPanel timeline, and OrderDashboard.
passed_tests: Backend: Migration script idempotency (exit code 0, MIGRASI BERSIH, invalid=0)
Backend: GET /api/sales-orders includes 'stage' and 'sub_status' for all 9 orders
Backend: All stages are valid (Reserved, Approved, Confirmed, Picked, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled)
Backend: Stage mapping correctness - reserved->Reserved, waiting_approval->Reserved, waiting_stock->Reserved, approved->Approved, confirmed->Confirmed, shipped->Shipped, done->Delivered
Backend: Sub-status mapping correct (siap_disahkan, menunggu_validasi, menunggu_stok, siap_confirm, siap_pick, sebagian_dikirim)
Backend: GET /api/sales-orders/{id} includes stage + sub_status
Backend: POST /api/sales-orders/{id}/approve updates status=approved AND stage=Approved
Backend: POST /api/sales-orders/{id}/confirm updates status=confirmed AND stage=Confirmed
Backend: Invalid transition returns guiding 409 with code=INVALID_TRANSITION, current_stage, current_status, allowed_from, and Indonesian message
Backend: No 5xx regressions on GET /api/sales-orders, GET /api/sales-orders/{id}, GET /api/sales-orders/stats/summary
Frontend: Admin login successful via demo-login-admin-button
Frontend: Navigation to Penjualan -> Pesanan Penjualan works
Frontend: Order List displays 9 order cards with stage pills (testid: order-status-{orderId})
Frontend: Order List displays sub-status chips (testid: order-row-substatus-{orderId}-*) with labels like 'Siap pick (gudang)'
Frontend: OrderDetailPanel opens on order click (testid: order-detail-panel)
Frontend: OrderDetailPanel header shows stage pill (testid: order-stage-pill)
Frontend: OrderDetailPanel shows stage-based timeline (testid: order-stage-timeline) with all 6 stages
Frontend: Stage timeline shows Reserved, Approved, Confirmed, Picked, Shipped, Delivered steps
Frontend: Stage timeline displays sub-status chips under active stage (testid: order-substatus-*)
Frontend: OrderDashboard tab accessible (testid: tab-dashboard)
Frontend: OrderDashboard shows 9 stage pills in Recent Orders table (testid: dashboard-order-stage-{orderId})
Frontend: No console errors or red error overlays on orders pages

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (22/23 tests passed - sales user login test timed out due to page state)
